strategyView.title: Strategy comparison
strategyView.intro: Monte Carlo results from the crafting simulator: three strategies share the same success rule. Costs use Chaos = 1, Essence = 3 unless changed in code.
strategyView.error: Could not load results. Try again.
strategyView.criteriaLine: Success: at least {minAffixes} affixes and at least {minGood} good mods (tier ≤ {tier}).
strategyView.metaLine: Trials: {trials} · Max chaos per attempt: {maxChaos} · Engine v{version}
strategyView.costLine: Unit costs — Chaos: {chaos} · Essence: {essence} · Essence strategy uses: {essenceKey}
